name: AWS Transfer Family (SFTP)
description: A high-performance local SFTP server emulating AWS Transfer Family. Connect and transfer files using standard SFTP clients.

aws.parity: Move files over SFTP locally exactly as clients will against a Transfer Family server — same protocol and auth.
aws.deploy: Provision an AWS Transfer Family SFTP server backed by an S3 bucket and migrate the users.

variables.label: SFTP Host Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the SFTP service.
